evals.name: trigger-signup-flow
evals.prompt: How does the signup flow work?

assertions.text: Describes the email-based security code flow: signup, 6-digit code generation, SHA-256 hashing, and verification

evals.name: trigger-rate-limiting
evals.prompt: I need to add rate limiting to a new endpoint

assertions.text: References the rate limiting per endpoint type pattern, IP blocking, and existing security middleware

evals.name: negative-locale-addition
evals.prompt: How do I add a new locale?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger the auth skill; i18n questions route to the translate skill instead
